identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-performance, dark-mode financial operating system that feels like a Bloomberg Terminal met a Swiss design studio.
principles: Content: Data is the hero. Numbers must be monospaced and aligned.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in dark mode. Neon accents for status.

theme_strategy.rationale: Financial professionals prefer dark mode for long sessions and data contrast. It conveys sophistication and reduces eye strain.

usage_rules: Headings: Uppercase or Sentence Case, tight tracking (-0.02em).
Numbers: ALWAYS use 'font-mono' for tabular data, prices, and percentages.
Labels: Uppercase, small text-xs, tracking-widest, text-muted-foreground.

containers.card_style: Flat background (bg-card), 1px border (border-border), no shadow. Sharp or minimal rounded corners (rounded-md).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.metric: p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg
cards.chart: p-6 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg h-[300px] or h-[400px]

traffic_light.description: Visual indicator for budget status. MUST be prominent.
traffic_light.implementation: Badge component with solid dot indicator + text label.

visual_enhancers.gradients: NO full-screen gradients. Use subtle 'spotlight' gradients on hover or active states.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Grid Borders' style: 1px solid border-border. Add 'border-r' and 'border-b' to grid items to create a technical look.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or modal overlays. backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80.
visual_enhancers.motion: Micro-interactions only. Hover states on table rows. Smooth transitions on charts.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use thin strokes (1.5px) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/barlow-condensed', '@fontsource/manrope', and '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono' to package.json.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use these fonts and the 'Financial Obsidian' color palette.
3. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a 'DashboardLayout' component with a sidebar navigation and a top bar. Use the 'Grid Borders' style for the sidebar.
4. BUILD COMPONENTS: Create 'BudgetStatus' (traffic light), 'KPICard' (with trend indicator), and 'ProjectCard'.
5. DATA VISUALIZATION: Use Recharts for the 'Budget vs Real' charts. Style them with the neon palette (Emerald/Amber/Red).
6. TABLES: Use Shadcn Table component but customize it: dense padding (p-2), mono font for numbers, right-align numeric columns.
7. AUTH: Create a clean, professional Login page with a split layout (Image on left, Form on right). Use one of the building images.
8. MOCK DATA: Create a robust 'mockData.js' file with realistic financial data (Projects, Budget Items, Movements) to populate the dashboard.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects sparingly (only for overlays).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add a premium feel.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
